name: Funeral Planning Companion
listingTitle: Funeral Planning Companion | End of Life Arrangements Organizer (Digital Download)

card.oneLiner: Your funeral wishes, arrangements, and who to call — decided calmly, in advance.

hero.headline: Your family will be grieving. They shouldn't also be guessing.
hero.lede: Every funeral decision your family would otherwise make in grief — wishes, arrangements, and contacts, organized in advance. Offline, private, printable.
hero.note: Instant download · No subscription · No account · Works on Mac, Windows, tablets & phones
hero.imageAlt: Funeral Planning Companion showing the My Wishes section

intro.heading: Your whole plan, in one gentle place
intro.body: Every funeral decision your family would otherwise make in the first days of grief — your wishes, the arrangements, and who to call — organized calmly, in advance.

features.title: 30 guided tasks

screens.caption: Service, music, and tone — decided calmly.
Funeral home, cemetery, and what's prepaid.
What an obituary and certificate require.

privacy.heading: Private by design, not by promise
privacy.body: Nothing you type ever leaves your device, and it never asks for a payment or account number by design.

cards.title: Zero network requests
cards.body: The app is a single file that runs entirely in your browser, on your device. It makes no connections and loads nothing from the internet. You can run it with Wi-Fi off.

cards.title: Never a password
cards.body: By design, it never asks for or stores passwords or PINs. It records that accounts exist and where your written instructions live — the map, never the keys.

cards.title: Yours forever
cards.body: One-time purchase. The file is yours, works offline for life, and will still open years from now, exactly as it does today.

priceCard.sub: the day-of and arrangements module — what a family scrambles to decide in the first 72 hours, decided calmly in advance.
bullets: 30 guided tasks across four phases: My Wishes, Arrangements, The Details, Hand It Off
A wishes section for service, burial or cremation, music, readings, and tone
An arrangements register: funeral home, cemetery, officiant, and what is prepaid
Vital details an obituary and death certificate need, in one place
People to notify, from family to employer to faith community
A one-click printable arrangements instruction sheet for whoever carries this out

faq.a: No. You pay 37 once and the app is yours forever. There is no account, no renewal, and nothing that expires.

faq.q: Do I need to install anything?
faq.a: No. You download a small file, double-click it, and it opens in the browser you already use — on Mac, Windows, tablets, and phones.
Yes, structurally. The app makes zero network requests — you can verify this with Wi-Fi turned off. Your entries live only on your device, and your backup is a file you control.

faq.q: What if it doesn't work for me?
faq.a: Email hello@quietkeep.co and we'll make it right. We answer every message.

crossSell.heading: Getting your affairs in order, too?
crossSell.body: Fourth Quietkeep organizer; pairs naturally with the Estate Planning Organizer (before-death) as the day-of companion.
